name: com.proanima.universal-vision-tracker
description: Unity-first computer vision runtime for frame sources, runtime adapters, output parsers, tracking, and debug visualization.

samples.description: Small scene bootstrap script for profile-driven tracker setup.
Synthetic VisionFrameResult fixture for previewing the UI Toolkit dashboard without a model.
Detection, pose, and segmentation VisionModelProfile templates with labels and parser schemas.
Polished synthetic VisionFrameResult scene for validating dashboard rendering before adding real models.
